channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The History and Politics Behind Kenya's Campaign Against Traditional Alcohol
item.description: Back in the early 1900s, home-made alcohol was part of everyday life in Kenya, especially among communities like the Mijikenda, where palm wine played a key role in ceremonies and rituals. The colonia...

item.title: Russian President Putin to hold strategic talks in China with Xi Jinping
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin is scheduled to visit China on 19th May for a two-day official trip, immediately following US President Donald Trump's recent visit to Beijing. The Kremlin announced t...

item.title: Colorado Governor Grants Clemency to Tina Peters After Controversial Sentence
item.description: Tina Peters, a 70-year-old former Mesa County clerk, had been serving a nine-year sentence for nonviolent actions related to her attempts to examine vulnerabilities in Colorado's electronic voting sys...

item.title: US and Nigerian forces successfully eliminate ISIS deputy leader Abu-Bilal al-Minuki
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on May 15, 2026, that Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, the second-in-command of ISIS worldwide, was killed in a joint operation conducted by American and Nigerian forces. Al-Mi...

item.title: Alberta Wildfire Prompts Evacuations in Clearwater County Backcountry
item.description: A rapidly spreading wildfire in Clearwater County, northwest of Sundre, Alberta, has prompted evacuation alerts for backcountry users and campers. The fire, detected Thursday and fanned by strong wind...

item.title: Best Victoria Day 2026 Sales on Home, Fashion, and Beauty Items
item.description: This Victoria Day long weekend, shoppers in Canada can take advantage of significant discounts across a wide range of products. The article highlights top deals on home furniture, kitchen appliances, ...

item.title: Deon Fourie to miss several months with knee injury ahead of URC play-offs
item.description: Stormers stand-in captain Deon Fourie will be sidelined for several months following a medial ligament knee injury sustained during the URC match against Ulster in Belfast. The 39-year-old veteran was...

item.title: Venezuela Fury, 16, prepares to marry Noah Price, 19, at Isle of Man church with family and Netflix crew present
item.description: Venezuela Fury, the 16-year-old daughter of boxer Tyson Fury and his wife Paris, is set to marry her 19-year-old fiancé Noah Price at the Victorian Royal Chapel of St John's on the Isle of Man. Weddin...

item.title: Reese Witherspoon’s Breakthrough Role in 'Freeway' at Age 19
item.description: In 1995, a 19-year-old Reese Witherspoon took on the challenging role of Vanessa Lutz in the dark, edgy film 'Freeway.' Director Matthew Bright described her performance as electrifying, comparing it ...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for May 16, 2026
item.description: This horoscope article provides insights and guidance for each zodiac sign for May 16, 2026. It highlights a birthday new moon, suggesting it is a period of potential success, particularly if ambition...

item.title: Abrahams Clarifies No Political Interference in TRC Cases Despite Resource Challenges
item.description: Former National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) head Shaun Abrahams has testified that no politician, including the president or the minister of justice, ever interfered with his work on prosecuting apart...

item.title: Melbourne Leads Hawthorn in Tight MCG Clash; North Melbourne Suffers Heavy Loss in Adelaide
item.description: The 2026 AFL clash between Melbourne and Hawthorn at the MCG has been a thrilling contest, with both sides exchanging the lead throughout the first half. Melbourne's young forward Matthew Jefferson na...

item.title: Waratahs winger Sid Harvey evades Drua defenders in impressive run
item.description: Waratahs winger Sid Harvey put on a display of skill as he managed to evade the Drua defence in a standout moment during the rugby union match. Harvey's agility and footwork were on full show, demonst...

item.title: Security lapse in hotel check-in system exposed over a million customer identity documents
item.description: A major security lapse in Tabiq, a hotel check-in system maintained by Japanese startup Reqrea, exposed more than one million passports, driver’s licenses, and selfie verification photos to the open w...

item.title: Protecting Tanzanian Girls from Early Marriage and Forced Motherhood
item.description: In this powerful opinion piece, journalist Beatrice Materu reflects on the real challenges of motherhood after celebrating Mother’s Day. As a grown woman with support systems, money, and access to inf...

item.title: 1953 Facel Ford Comète: A Rare Example of Franco-American Automotive Craftsmanship
item.description: The 1953 Facel Ford Comète represents a remarkable blend of French design and American engineering from the post-World War II era. While powered by a modest Ford V8 engine, the car's design was entire...

item.title: Examining Antisemitism in Australia After the Bondi Beach Attack
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion was set up in January 2026 following the tragic Bondi Beach terror attack. Chaired by former High Court justice Virginia Bell, the commission a...

item.title: Vice Ganda Withdraws from Jessica Sanchez's Upcoming Concert
item.description: Filipino comedian and TV host Vice Ganda will no longer be part of the upcoming Jessica Sanchez concert, scheduled to take place at the Araneta Coliseum. While the reason for his withdrawal has not be...

item.title: PQ alleges Conservative party may have breached election laws in Arthabaska by-election
item.description: The Parti Québécois (PQ) has raised concerns that the Conservative Party may have violated election laws during the recent Arthabaska by-election. The PQ claims there were irregularities in the conduc...

item.title: Texas Children’s Hospital to Open Detransition Clinic Following DOJ Settlement
item.description: Texas Children’s Hospital in Houston will establish the nation’s first dedicated 'detransition clinic' as part of a $10 million settlement with the Department of Justice and the state of Texas. The se...
